examples: Her sloe wine was especially strong.
You'd better sloe down. Don't dance so fast.
Plums are thought to have developed originally from the sloe.
True to Benedictine rules of self-sufficiency, Father Rainer saw the future in apple cider and brandy, damson, sloe and elderberry gin.
In the cosy front room of La Sablonnerie, Elizabeth is happy to share some of her homemade sloe gin as well as a few ghost stories.
